summary: Matched the common fighter PassiveCeil action by replacing the old ft_0C08 assembly object with src/melee/ft/chara/ftCommon/ftCo_PassiveCeil.c. The PR report shows 100.00% match for the new 608-byte file and all six functions. It also renamed/moved the ft_0C08 header into the ftCommon PassiveCeil module, improved related ftCo_PassiveWall and ftCo_DatAttrs names, and relocated remaining sbss globals ft_804D6580/ft_804D6588 to ft_0C31.
what_changed: Deleted asm/melee/ft/ft_0C08.s and replaced its text object entry in obj_files.mk with src/melee/ft/chara/ftCommon/ftCo_PassiveCeil.c.o.
Added C implementations for ftCo_800C23A0, ftCo_800C23FC, ftCo_PassiveCeil_Anim, ftCo_PassiveCeil_IASA, ftCo_PassiveCeil_Phys, and ftCo_PassiveCeil_Coll.
ftCo_800C23A0 now checks GET_FIGHTER(gobj)->coll_data.env_flags for MPCOLL_FLAGS_B14 and calls ftCo_800986B0 before entering PassiveCeil through ftCo_800C23FC.

ftCo_800C23FC reconstructs the PassiveCeil transition: resets throw_flags, computes an ECB top-based effect offset, calls ftKb_SpecialN_800F1F1C, changes to ftCo_MS_PassiveCeil, spawns the ceiling-passive effect with efAsync_Spawn, adjusts cur_pos.y by x68C_transNPos.y, and invokes follow-up common fighter/audio/color routines.
ftCo_PassiveCeil_Anim handles ftCheckThrowB3 by setting self_vel.x from input.lstick.x times co_attrs.passiveceil_vel_x, and exits to ftCo_800CC730 when animation frames are exhausted.
ftCo_PassiveCeil_Phys and ftCo_PassiveCeil_Coll are small wrappers around ft_80084DB0 and ft_800831CC(gobj, ftCo_80096CC8, ft_80082B1C).
Renamed src/melee/ft/ft_0C08.h to src/melee/ft/chara/ftCommon/ftCo_PassiveCeil.h and replaced UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS for ftCo_800C23FC with a typed void ftCo_800C23FC(ftCo_GObj* gobj) prototype.
Updated includes in dependent files to include ftCo_PassiveCeil.h where PassiveCeil declarations are needed and to stop including the removed ft/ft_0C08.h.
Moved ft_804D6580 and ft_804D6588 extern declarations out of PassiveCeil.h into ft_0C31.h, matching the diff that moved their sbss definitions from deleted ft_0C08.s into asm/melee/ft/ft_0C31.s.
Renamed ftCo_DatAttrs fields x100 to passivewall_vel_x and x10C to passiveceil_vel_x, and updated PassiveWall code to use passivewall_vel_x.
Cleaned a PassiveWall parameter spelling from veL_y_exponent to vel_y_exponent and adjusted an unused-stack matching block placement around effect-position code.
smart_moves: Converted the old address-bucket module ft_0C08 into a semantic ftCommon action module, making future references searchable as ftCo_PassiveCeil instead of by address.
Kept leftover non-PassiveCeil sbss symbols ft_804D6580 and ft_804D6588 alive by moving them to ft_0C31 instead of leaving them in the renamed PassiveCeil header/source.
Used domain-specific attr names passivewall_vel_x and passiveceil_vel_x once the PassiveCeil and PassiveWall behavior made the old x100/x10C meanings clear.
Preserved matching-sensitive stack layout with explicit MUST_MATCH-only unused stack arrays documented by @todo comments.
Noted shared-code evidence between ftCo_800C23FC and ftCo_800C1E64 instead of prematurely refactoring it, avoiding match risk while documenting a future cleanup target.
Updated the build object list at the same time as deleting the assembly file, making the C file the compiled replacement for the matched text region.
decomp_lessons: When a decompiled action replaces an address-named assembly island, rename the header into the semantic ftCommon module and fix includes at call sites; do not keep declarations in stale ft_0Cxx headers.
If an assembly file contains unrelated sbss/data symbols, relocate those declarations/definitions to the remaining module that owns them before deleting the file.
Recovered common-action code can reveal struct field meanings; here PassiveWall and PassiveCeil velocity formulas justified naming ftCo_DatAttrs +0x100 passivewall_vel_x and +0x10C passiveceil_vel_x.
For small action callbacks, matching often means preserving exact wrapper shape: empty IASA, one-call Phys, one-call Coll, and animation-end checks using ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining.
Document but do not collapse shared code during a matching PR if shared-code extraction could perturb codegen.
naming_conventions: Use ftCo_PassiveCeil.c/.h for the common fighter PassiveCeil action rather than ft_0C08.c/.h.
Keep action callbacks named ftCo_PassiveCeil_Anim, ftCo_PassiveCeil_IASA, ftCo_PassiveCeil_Phys, and ftCo_PassiveCeil_Coll.
Use typed ftCo_GObj* prototypes for common fighter action functions when the argument is known.
Prefer lowercase descriptive struct field names such as passivewall_vel_x and passiveceil_vel_x over placeholder x100/x10C names.
Fix typo-like parameter names when evidence is clear: veL_y_exponent became vel_y_exponent.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Replaced asm/melee/ft/ft_0C08.s after achieving a 100.00% report for the C file.
Used #ifdef MUST_MATCH stack padding arrays in ftCo_800C23FC and ftCo_PassiveCeil_Anim to account for unused stack in the original assembly.
Matched effect-position code by scoping local Vec3 variables and storing intermediate float offsets such as pos_y_offset.
Preserved exact call sequence around state change, effect spawn, position adjustment, and common follow-up routines in ftCo_800C23FC.
Moved sbss globals ft_804D6580 and ft_804D6588 into ft_0C31.s so deleting ft_0C08.s did not drop those symbols.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that remove the @todo shared code between ftCo_800C23FC and ftCo_800C1E64.
Search for remaining includes of ft/ft_0C08.h or references to deleted ft_0C08 after this PR.
Audit ftCo_DatAttrs neighboring placeholder fields after passivewall_vel_x and passiveceil_vel_x for more action-derived names.
Look for later PRs that type ft_800C80A4 or further move ft_804D6580/ft_804D6588 out of ft_0C31.
